sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16025" key="a)rxi/frouros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχί-φρουρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n16025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">commandant of a</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φρουρά, Ἀρχ.Ἐφ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1911.124</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Gonnos</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
